title: Chi Hu
content:
Chi Hu
 was the Patriarch of the 
Giant Demon Clan
 who befriended 
Wang Lin
 in the 
Rain Celestial Realm
.

After Wang Lin became "Lord of The Sealed Realm," he returned home to 
Planet Suzaku
, only to find the planet completely changed and most of his old friends long dead, including Chi Hu.

Appearance in donghua: Episode 64
